name: Bigger Resource Stacks And Reduced Weight
author: ZmallBang
description: Increases resource stack sizes and reduces item weight in a single, conflict-free mod.
summary: Increases resource stack sizes and reduces item weight in a single, conflict-free mod.

name: Caramel Easy LevelUP
author: Caramel aka RED RIFT
description:
Progression is now very easy!
Leveling up your character is now very easy!
summary:
Progression is now very easy!
Leveling up your character is now very easy!

name: Caramel Level Plus
author: Caramel aka RED RIFT
description: This mod will add a max level of 50 to your pets.
summary: This mod will add a max level of 50 to your pets.

name: Caramel Speed and Weight
author: Caramel aka RED RIFT
description: This mod is created for those who want to spend more time on comfortable travel.
summary: This mod is created for those who want to spend more time on comfortable travel.

name: Caramel Stack size Plus
author: Caramel aka RED RIFT
description: The mod increases the storage stacks for ore, ingots, wood, building blocks, fuel cans, batteries etc.
summary: The mod increases the storage stacks for ore, ingots, wood, building blocks, fuel cans, batteries etc.

name: Currency Miner
author: LusciousLewLew
description: This mod swaps out ore deposit nodes with nodes for all workshop currencies.
summary: This mod swaps out ore deposit nodes with nodes for all workshop currencies.

name: Easy building
author: Caramel aka RED RIFT
description:
This mod is created for those who love to create beautiful buildings.
Making electronics and some other items is becoming more efficient and easier.
This mod not change game mechanics.
summary:
This mod is created for those who love to create beautiful buildings.
Making electronics and some other items is becoming more efficient and easier.
This mod not change game mechanics.

name: Eclipse's Stacks
author: Eoniclipse
description: This Mod changes the Stack sizes of Items.
summary: This Mod changes the Stack sizes of Items.

name: Eclipse's Workshop
author: Eoniclipse
description: This mod alters Workshop items to be more useful.
summary: This mod alters Workshop items to be more useful.

name: Ferani's Buyable Zebras
author: Ferani
description: The zebra mounts from the Zebra Rescue Mission DLC are now available for purchase at the workshop! Buy as many striped best friends as you wish.
summary: The zebra mounts from the Zebra Rescue Mission DLC are now available for purchase at the workshop! Buy as many striped best friends as you wish.

name: Ferani's Mount Compass
author: Feranishades
description: Mount icons on the compass have no max distance. It might make your compass a little crowded... But at least you can find your pets!
summary: Mount icons on the compass have no max distance. It might make your compass a little crowded... But at least you can find your pets!

name: FGAG Icarus Balance Overhaul
author: DaiyaDxiya
description:
JP: このMODではゲームのパラメーターを調整し、カジュアルなプレイができるようにします。

EN: This mod adjusts the game parameters to allow for casual play.
summary:
JP: このMODではゲームのパラメーターを調整し、カジュアルなプレイができるようにします。

EN: This mod adjusts the game parameters to allow for casual play.

name: Hazers Range Ex
author: Shelly3000
description: Extending the range of heaters, campfires, etc.
summary: Extending the range of heaters, campfires, etc.

name: Hazers Stacks 500
author: Shelly3000
description: Increased the most Stacks to 500
summary: Increased the most Stacks to 500

name: Mining Drill Speed Multiplier
author: ZmallBang
description:
Reduces mining drill extraction time by scaling each drill’s existing mining duration.
This makes drills extract resources faster while preserving progression between drill tiers.
summary:
Reduces mining drill extraction time by scaling each drill’s existing mining duration.
This makes drills extract resources faster while preserving progression between drill tiers.

name: Mission Rewards Multiplier
author: ZmallBang
description: Multiplies mission rewards, including credits, account experience, and faction experience, reducing the need to repeat missions while preserving normal gameplay flow.
summary: Multiplies mission rewards, including credits, account experience, and faction experience, reducing the need to repeat missions while preserving normal gameplay flow.

name: Mission Rewards x10
author: nik4kin
description: Mission rewards x10 (Licence x5) + SMPL3 rewards UP. Optional files for x20 (x10) and x2 (x1) w/o SMPL3 change.
summary: Mission rewards x10 (Licence x5) + SMPL3 rewards UP. Optional files for x20 (x10) and x2 (x1) w/o SMPL3 change.

name: Mounts And Tames Speed Multiplier
author: ZmallBang
description:
Increases movement speed for mounts and tamed animals by 1.5x, 2x, 3x, or 5x.
Makes travel faster and smoother for both riding and companion movement.
Great for exploration and co-op play wi
summary:
Increases movement speed for mounts and tamed animals by 1.5x, 2x, 3x, or 5x.
Makes travel faster and smoother for both riding and companion movement.
Great for exploration and co-op play without changing other stats.

name: No More Forest Fires
author: MMM0513
description: Only you can prevent forest fires! Removes Lightning from storms, so no more tree destruction.
summary: Only you can prevent forest fires! Removes Lightning from storms, so no more tree destruction.

name: Polski_Ikarus
author: Dariush
description: Spolszczenie do gry Icarus. Dodaje język Polski do gry.Adds Polish language to the game.
summary: Spolszczenie do gry Icarus. Dodaje język Polski do gry.Adds Polish language to the game.

name: Poulpe Industries  Ballistic and Armored
author: stnlepoulpe
description: Poulpe Industries is a dual-module overhaul for ICARUS that enhances both weapon systems and armor gameplay new weapon, munition, armor, backpack
summary: Poulpe Industries is a dual-module overhaul for ICARUS that enhances both weapon systems and armor gameplay new weapon, munition, armor, backpack

name: Ultimate Envirosuit
author: RheumPrime
description: I play this game to enjoy myself, not to grind like a worker.
summary: I play this game to enjoy myself, not to grind like a worker.
